purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.
source: raw/sources/Historia del Hospital Clínico Regional de Concepción, Carlos Pérez Arrau, September 2013, pp. 45–48, Appendix Directors of Hospital Clínico Regional.pdf

skipped_regions.source_context: This is a framed advertisement or listing for the 'CLINICA DEL HOSPICIO' detailing its services and staff.
